title: APC NetBotz Environmental SNMP Temperature Threshold Breach
dataSources: `index=power|cooling|environment` · `sourcetype="snmp:apc:envmon"` (APC PowerNet / AirIR / ATS / NetBotz OIDs per deployment)
app: Splunk Connect for SNMP (SC4SNMP) or SNMP Modular Input; APC PowerNet-MIB / AirIR-MIB field extractions
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="snmp:apc:envmon" earliest=-4h
| eval temp=tonumber(coalesce(tempSensorTemperature, probeTemp, temp_c, ""))
| eval probe=coalesce(probeName, sensor_name, "")
| where temp>30 OR temp<10
| table _time rack probe temp
description: Hot spots at cabinet intakes precede thermal shutdowns; cold breaches matter for condensation in humid climates.
value: Extends monitoring beyond BMS zones into cabinet granularity.
implementation: (1) Calibrate offsets per probe. (2) Map probes to U positions.
grandmaExplanation: We alert on hot or cold spots picked up by environmental probes.
